name: Tailwind
author: Masthead
description: A clean, website-first theme styled with Tailwind CSS: a full navbar with an uploadable logo, a hero, and a card grid. Tailwind is loaded from its CDN so you can use any utility class — including arbitrary values — directly in your pages.

metadata.label: Page layout
metadata.description: Use 'wide' for full-width pages like a landing page; 'contained' centers a readable column.

metadata.label: Show site navigation
metadata.description: Untick to hide the navbar and footer on this page only — useful for a standalone splash page.
